match.userMessage:
Steady handheld drift forward at eye level as sunlit hands continue sliding the coral lipstick tube fully out of the open white box on the vanity. Fingers adjust grip on the tube base with precise, gentle control. Warm morning sunlight casts shifting highlights across skin and metallic surfaces while soft shadows move naturally across the white tabletop.

quiet morning room tone with soft window light ambiance. soft cardboard lid movement, subtle lipstick tube sliding out.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
